description: While playing a game on KGS, my opponent forgot to defend a weakness on his border. Make black regret he didn't enforce this border (should be easy ;-) ) [The southern part of the black group was changed to make it obvious that the black group was already alive and the position, which took place in the center, moved to the side for convenience]

Black is almost safe from any loss now.])(;W[io];B[jo]TR[jp]C[Don't give black a ko which moreover threatens the white stone at K4.]))(;W[mo];B[kp]C[Black is safe now])(;W[lp];B[kp])(;W[kp];B[jp]))(;B[jp](;W[mo];B[mp](;W[lo];B[kp];W[lp];B[lq]C[Black suffers a great lossRIGHT])(;W[lp](;B[lo]C[];W[mo]C[Snapback, terrible for blackRIGHT])(;B[kp];W[lo];B[lq]C[Black suffers a great lossRIGHT])))(;W[lo];B[mo])(;W[lp];B[mo])(;W[mp];B[mo])(;W[kp];B[mo]))(;B[lp]C[CHOICE](;W[lo];B[mo](;W[jp];B[kp];W[jo]C[A nice little reduction.
